title: Merger and consolidation
doc_html:
§1121.  Merger and consolidation

Professional optometry corporations may be merged into or consolidated only with other professional optometry corporations.  

Added by Acts 1980, No. 404, §1.

§1121.  Merger and consolidation

Added by Acts 1980, No. 404, §1.
